description: Phase 1 cross-lane structural pattern map. Surfaces co-movements, contradictions, orphans, and confidence asymmetries across all 7 miner outputs.
purpose: This contract defines the output of lab_cross_corr_v1. The pattern map feeds into lab_orient for hypothesis construction and lab_decide for bifurcation reconciliation. All entries are structural observations — no predictive or hypothesis language is permitted.

swarms.constraint: Non-empty when structural co-movements exist. Each swarm represents the same subject/theme observed in 3+ lanes.
swarms.semantics: Multi-lane convergence patterns. High-signal indicators of real forces.

bifurcations.constraint: Non-empty when cross-lane conflicts exist. lab_decide MUST reconcile each bifurcation.
bifurcations.semantics: Explicit cross-lane contradictions on the same subject or theme. These are the highest-value state per Lab mission doctrine.

orphans.constraint: May be empty. Significant single-lane signals flagged for visibility.
orphans.semantics: Signals seen in only one lane. Low confidence individually but may become important if confirmed later.

confidence_asymmetries.constraint: May be empty. Same subject with materially mixed confidence across lanes.
confidence_asymmetries.semantics: Cases where lanes agree on a subject but disagree on signal strength or reliability.

lanes.constraint: Uppercase lane labels. Minimum 3 for a swarm.

summary.constraint: One sentence structural description only. No predictive language.

lanes.constraint: Uppercase lane labels showing the conflict.

summary.constraint: One sentence describing the contradiction structure. No hypothesis language.

language_rules.allowed: Observational and relational language (co-moves, diverges, aligns, conflicts).
language_rules.forbidden: Predictive or hypothesis language (will cause, implies outcome, therefore market). Any question mark is a contract failure.
